mapper.sql: select c.id, c.title, c.description, c.startDate, c.endDate, c.status, c.totalPoints, c.createdAt, count(cq.questionId) as questionCount, group_concat(q.title order by cq.questionOrder separator ' | ') as questionTitles from competitions c left join competition_questions cq on cq.competitionId = c.id left join questions q on q.id = cq.questionId
mapper.select: select id, title, description, startDate, endDate, status, totalPoints, createdAt from competitions order by id desc
select questionId from competition_questions where competitionId = #{competitionId} order by questionOrder asc, questionId asc

select q.id, q.title, q.content, q.options, q.correctAnswer, q.difficulty, q.category, q.points, q.createdAt from competition_questions cq inner join questions q on q.id = cq.questionId where cq.competitionId = #{competitionId} order by cq.questionOrder asc, q.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into competitions ( title, description, startDate, endDate, status, totalPoints, createdAt ) values ( #{title}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{totalPoints}, sysdate() )

insert into competition_questions (competitionId, questionId, questionOrder) values
(#{competitionId}, #{questionId}, #{index})
